meaning: n.(以广告收入支付开支的)免费报纸,赠阅报纸
examples: One thing that divides freesheet publishers is their approach to the Internet.
The national freesheet Metro was up 8% to 3, 597, 000, while the Sunday Times was up 1% to 3, 238, 000.
That contract is up for renewal next year, and analysts expect rivals, possibly including News Corp., which publishes an afternoon freesheet in London, to jump into the fray.
It sold the London daily Evening Standard - which is now a freesheet - to Russian billionaire Alexander Lebedev and closed its London Lite free paper.
